caption: A man with blonde, spiked hair, glasses, and black headphones is positioned in a studio setting, facing toward the right. He wears a white button-down shirt accented with yellow suspenders and a patterned tie. In front of him is a black professional microphone on a stand. The background features a blurred indoor environment with a poster that reads "UNIQUE FASHIONS" and a framed logo of a shield on the wall. On-screen graphics include a logo on the left that says "#REALTALK PODCAST" and red text on the right that says "REAL TALK 101". Across the sequence, the man remains in a similar posture, speaking into the microphone with slight movements of his head and mouth, while the camera and background remain static.
